title: barlerites hochstetteri
intro: Barlerites hochstetteri, also known as the "Madder Berry" or "Sarca", is a shrub-like plant native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Violaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of anthraquinones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Barlerites hochstetteri include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while also being used as a natural dye. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, or as a dried powder, to be taken orally or applied topically as a paste or cream.
